notes: v1.2.23: Centered text and icons on add-action buttons. Redesigned Image Search dialog to a modern single-column layout matching reference: preview box + Capture/Browse side-by-side, similarity coefficient with note, position-mouse checkbox, search region radios with capture-region button, when-found/when-not-found dropdowns, key-to-press with clear button, wait timeout, click offset, random-click + loop checkboxes, and bottom meta row. All existing data fields preserved.
